name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-34
title: Deployed SKILL.md copies under .claude/skills/ drift from source under .claude/features/<X>/skills/
description:
## Observation

During Task 3.2, the rabbit-feature-new SKILL.md was updated at the source location (.claude/features/rabbit-feature/skills/rabbit-feature-new/SKILL.md) to v1.2.0. The deployed copy at .claude/skills/rabbit-feature-new/SKILL.md is NOT automatically resynced — it relies on the manifest-driven publish flow (install.py) being run manually.

The Task 3.2 subagent noted: 'The deployed copy .claude/skills/rabbit-feature-new/SKILL.md is out of sync with the source. install.py's manifest-driven publish will resync on next install run; no rabbit-feature test currently enforces byte-identical sync for this skill (Inv 40 covers the manifest mechanism via tempdir, not the live deployed copy).'

## Why this is a backlog item not a bug

The publish flow IS the established mechanism — it just isn't on a Stop hook or auto-trigger. So 'drift' here is really 'unpublished change pending'. Operators MUST remember to run install.py after any source-side SKILL.md change.

## Suggested enhancement

Options (decision deferred to housekeeping wave):

(a) Add a check_drift_regenerate-style runtime API entry that fires on Stop or SessionStart and re-publishes the deployed SKILL.md copies whenever source > deployed (byte-equality check). Automatic, but adds Stop-hook work.

(b) Add a regression test that compares each source SKILL.md against its deployed counterpart and FAILs on drift. Surfaces the gap loudly without auto-publishing. Requires operators to run install.py before the suite passes.

(c) Move SKILL.md to a single source location (deployed location is the source) and stop the publish indirection entirely. Architectural change; bigger refactor.

## Workaround

For now, run install.py manually after any SKILL.md source edit. The deployed copy is what Claude Code actually loads at runtime.

history.note: Preventive regression test added in contract (deployed-skills-match-source) per design option (b); currently no drift, test passes vacuously and will FAIL loudly on future source-only SKILL.md edits
